purpose: Stores inbound lead-capture records from buyer-facing and seller-facing capture points.

document_example.notes: Captured from property page price alert CTA.

source.description: Entry point that created the lead.

property_id.description: Website property identifier when the lead is tied to a specific property.

suburb.description: Lowercased canonical suburb slug when known.

owner.description: Current human owner of the lead.

next_action_at.description: Next scheduled follow-up or review time.

lead_quality.description: Simple triage bucket for early-stage lead handling.

application_rules: Always store email and suburb in lowercase canonical form before insert.
Set status='new' on insert unless a downstream workflow explicitly overrides it.
Require suburb for price_alert, analyse_home, and market_report submissions when the frontend already knows it.
Set first_response_at the first time status moves away from 'new'.

index_recommendations.name: idx_leads_status_next_action_created
index_recommendations.rationale: Primary CRM queue for new leads and due follow-ups.

index_recommendations.name: idx_leads_owner_status_next_action
index_recommendations.rationale: Owner work queue and handoff tracking.

index_recommendations.name: idx_leads_source_created
index_recommendations.rationale: Fast source-level reporting and recent lead capture breakdowns.

index_recommendations.name: idx_leads_property_source_created
index_recommendations.rationale: Property-page alert lookup and per-property lead history.

index_recommendations.name: idx_leads_email_created
index_recommendations.rationale: Fast lookup of prior submissions by the same email.
